---
title: "eda_2"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(arrow)
library(ggthemes)
library(tigris)
library(sf)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")
```

```{r}
glimpse(data[1:23])
```

```{r}
puma_summary <- data %>%
  select(puma, povpip) %>%
  group_by(puma) %>% 
  summarise(mean(povpip, na.rm = TRUE),
            pct_below_poverty = mean(povpip < 100, na.rm = TRUE) * 100)
```

```{r}
puma_shapes <- pumas(state = "CA", year = 2020, cb = TRUE)
```

```{r}
puma_shapes <- puma_shapes %>%
  mutate(puma = as.character(PUMACE20))  # column name may vary by year

puma_summary <- puma_summary %>%
  mutate(puma = as.character(puma))

map_data <- puma_shapes %>%
  left_join(puma_summary, by = "puma")
```

```{r}
ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = pct_below_poverty), color = "white", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "% Below Poverty Line",
    option = "magma",
    direction = -1,
    na.value = "grey80"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Poverty Rate by PUMA",
    subtitle = "Percentage of population with income below poverty level (POVPIP < 100)",
    caption = "Source: ACS PUMS"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```

```{r}
# Get LA County boundary
la_county <- counties(state = "CA", cb = TRUE) %>%
  filter(NAME == "Los Angeles")

# Filter PUMAs that intersect LA County
la_pumas <- map_data %>%
  st_filter(la_county)

ggplot(la_pumas) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = pct_below_poverty), color = "white", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "% Below Poverty Line",
    option = "magma",
    direction = -1,
    na.value = "grey80"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Poverty Rate by PUMA - Los Angeles County",
       subtitle = "Percentage of population with income below poverty level (POVPIP < 100)",
       caption = "Source: ACS PUMS") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```
  
```{r}
ggplot(map_data) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = pct_below_poverty), color = "white", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "% In Poverty",
    option = "magma",
    direction = -1,
    na.value = "grey80"
  ) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-119.0, -117.6), ylim = c(33.7, 34.9)) +
  labs(title = "Poverty Rate by PUMA - Los Angeles County",
       subtitle = "Percentage of population with income below poverty level (POVPIP < 100)",
       caption = "Source: ACS PUMS") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```
